name: Neck Roll
cue:
Drop your right ear to your right shoulder
Hold for 5 seconds
Switch to left side
Repeat 3 times each side

name: Shoulder Roll
cue:
Roll both shoulders forward in large circles
Repeat 5 times forward
Then reverse for 5 more backward

name: Chest Opener
cue:
Clasp hands behind your back
Squeeze shoulder blades together
Lift your chest upward
Hold 10 seconds, repeat 3 times

name: Wrist Circles
cue:
Extend both arms out in front
Make fists with both hands
Rotate wrists 5 times each direction

name: Wrist Stretch
cue:
Extend one arm, palm facing up
Gently pull fingers back with other hand
Hold 10 seconds
Switch hands and repeat

name: Seated Spinal Twist
cue:
Sit tall in your chair
Place right hand on left knee
Gently twist your body left
Hold 15 seconds, then switch sides

name: Hip Flexor Stretch
cue:
Sit at the edge of your chair
Extend right leg back behind you
Press hip forward gently
Hold 15 seconds, switch sides

name: 20-20-20 Eye Rest
cue:
Look away from your screen
Find something 20 feet (6 m) away
Focus on it for 20 seconds
Blink slowly to re-moisturise your eyes

name: Upper Back Stretch
cue:
Interlace your fingers together
Reach both arms forward
Round your upper back
Hold 15 seconds, repeat twice

name: Ankle Circles
cue:
Lift one foot slightly off the floor
Rotate the ankle in full circles
Do 5 circles each direction
Switch feet and repeat
